entity.summary: Botanix concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange with residual liquidity and historical trading activity but no recent recorded DEX volume.
entity.notes: Current protocol data preserves Arch Swap as a Botanix CLMM and reports residual TVL together with cumulative historical fees and volume. However, 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume are reported as zero. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead. A stable first-party application URL was not promoted in this review pass.

evidence.title: Arch Swap protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies Arch Swap as a concentrated-liquidity DEX on Botanix.

evidence.title: Arch Swap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX discovery data preserves the Arch Swap identity and Botanix chain association.

evidence.title: Arch Swap protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Residual TVL remains, but recent DEX-volume windows are zero, supporting a limited classification.
